summary: E-commerce project with checkout shipping logic (₹80 below ₹2999, free above), a Returns Page at /returns with mandatory video upload and full form validation, and an Admin Panel at /admin with PIN protection for reviewing/playing/downloading submitted return requests with videos stored on-chain.
architectural_notes: Videos uploaded via Returns Page are stored on-chain inside the canister for persistence.
Admin Panel at /admin is protected by existing PIN login — do not modify authentication or routing.
Returns Page is a standalone page at /returns — no UI/layout/styling changes permitted.

existing_features.title: Update the Returns Page (/returns) form so that ALL fields are required: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, and Video Upload. The form must be blocked from submission if any field is empty or no video is uploaded.

Add a mandatory video upload section to the Returns Page (/returns) with the section title 'Upload Unboxing / Condition Video' and description 'To process a return request, please upload a video showing the condition of the product.' Video must be MP4, MOV, or WEBM format only, maximum 50MB. Show an inline error 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.' if no video is selected on submission. Show a file preview (video element) and upload progress bar after a file is selected.

Update the Admin Panel (/admin) to display submitted return requests showing: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Message, and the uploaded video. Admin must be able to play the video inline and download it. The existing PIN protection must remain completely untouched.

new_feature_requests.summary: Returns Page at /returns with mandatory video upload (MP4/MOV/WEBM, max 50MB), all fields required, inline error messages, file preview, upload progress
Admin Panel at /admin displaying submitted return requests with inline video playback and download; videos stored on-chain; existing PIN protection untouched
Checkout shipping logic: ₹80 for orders below ₹2999, free shipping above ₹2999, updating dynamically

Update the backend (main.mo) to store return requests with all required fields: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, and the uploaded video (stored as a Blob/[Nat8] on-chain). Ensure the submitReturnRequest endpoint accepts and persists the video data.
